app_concept.archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) / Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - 'Studio Control Center'
app_concept.vibe: Tactile, precise, hardware-inspired, low-latency feel, DAW aesthetic. It should feel like a premium piece of software configuring real hardware.

rules: Do not use Inter for main headings. Use IBM Plex Sans (or a similar strong sans) for high legibility.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric values, port names, app names, volume percentages, and connection statuses to give it a technical, precision feel.
Use uppercase wide-tracking (tracking-[0.2em]) for overlines, panel headers, and section labels (e.g., 'MIDI IN', 'LIVE SESSIONS', 'MASTER VOLUME').
Keep font sizes compact for dense data readability (text-xs to text-sm).

layout_and_spacing.grid_configuration: Base grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6. Dense and structured.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use tight padding inside cards (p-4 or p-6) but ensure distinct visual separation between modules.

panels.sidebar: Live Audio Sessions / Profiles (col-span-12 lg:col-span-3 or 4)
panels.main_stage: Hardware Visualizer Map (col-span-12 lg:col-span-9 or 8) - Interactive Launchkey 37 Representation

component_styles.cards: Flat solid surfaces. NO GLASSMORPHISM for the main app to prevent a 'fragile' feel. Background #121212, 1px solid border #262626. Max border-radius: 4px (rounded-sm or rounded-md).
component_styles.buttons: Tactile, sharp edges. Primary actions use #FF5500 with a subtle inner glow. Default buttons use #1A1A1A with hover text-white and border shift.
component_styles.drum_pads: Aspect-square boxes in the UI. Default: bg-[#1A1A1A] border #262626. Active/Assigned: Border #FF5500 or glowing colors with inner drop shadow.
component_styles.sliders_and_knobs: Use standard Shadcn sliders but customized. Track color #262626, thumb color #A3A3A3, hover thumb #FF5500. Add numeric outputs next to them.

image_urls.description: Subtle abstract hardware texture. Use with high opacity overlay (bg-black/90 or 95) to break up the flat black background.
Inspirational visual for the 'Disconnected' or 'Connect Device' welcome state.

motion_and_interactions.midi_learn: When MIDI learn is active, pulse the background or border of the target UI element or the entire header (animate-pulse with #FF5500).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must shift slightly in brightness instantly (e.g., bg-[#121212] to bg-[#1A1A1A]). Avoid overly sluggish animations to preserve the 'pro hardware' feel.
motion_and_interactions.event_log: New terminal lines should slide up and fade in smoothly to represent live MIDI stream data.

icons_and_libraries.icons: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react. Recommend Phosphor Icons for a denser, more technical hardware dashboard look.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required font families (IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono, Inter) from Google Fonts.
Ensure all data displays (volumes, port numbers, app names) use the JetBrains Mono font.
The header must NOT be transparent; use solid #050505 or #121212 with a bottom border. Include connection status dot (green/red) here.
Every interactive element, input, and button MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on its role.
Do not build HTML datepickers/selects; use Shadcn components but heavily override their styles to match the dark hardware theme (remove overly rounded corners, apply dark gray borders).
Build a custom visual representation of the Launchkey 37 using a CSS grid for the pads (2x8), knobs (8), and transport controls.
Setup Tailwind config with the custom colors mentioned above (base, surface, border, accents).
The layout should follow the 'Control Room' grid—use h-full and stretch children to make columns match heights. Ensure no jagged bottoms.
For volume meters in the 'Live Sessions' panel, use horizontal progress bars with an accent color.
